title: Docusign doc filling with monday values
excerpt:
Before I open a docusign account (currently using dotloop since 2010) Is it possible to have a docusign form filled using data from monday? 
Can I press a button and have the entire document filled and prepped for esigna…

posts.author: dfurt (Daniel Furtick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Before I open a docusign account (currently using dotloop since 2010) Is it possible to have a docusign form filled using data from monday?

Can I press a button and have the entire document filled and prepped for esignature? can it be emailed to the signer automatically etc. If this is a go I will move over to docusign

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @dfurt - There is a Docusign app for monday in the Marketplace here: https://mondaycom.grsm.io/docusign-app

Here’s a demo video for it: eDigital Signatures for monday.com - YouTube

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi we are about to release docusign monday.com alternative for easily streamlining edigital signatures monday.com workflows.

You can sign up to get early access.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is an Update regarding DoucSign monday.com alternative. With GetSign you can prepare, send, sign, and track eSignatures effortlessly on top of monday.com Work OS with an affordable pricing plan and easy setup.

GetSign has a drag and drop experience for filling your template with you monday.com boards values. Check it out!
